---
title: 'dapR2 (week 12 Lect2): Activity1'
author: "Alex Doumas"
date: "14/09/2020"
output: html_document
---

# Question 1

Try running the model comparison tests shown in the lecture for yourself using the hospital.csv data. Use model comparison to test for the main effects of Hospital and Treatment, and the interaction of hospital and treatment.
